prompt: Swap in the manga’s speech-bubble shape and hand-drawn Japanese font style for the question text

The shape of this new speech bubble should be an irregular, jagged outline, mirroring the style of the speech bubble present in image 2. Inside this new speech bubble, render the Japanese translation of "Is this a pigeon?", specifically "これ、ハトですか？". The font for this Japanese text should be a hand-drawn, energetic style, consistent with the Japanese text seen in image 2.
objects: "Is this a pigeon?" text (should not be present)
